title: figma-registry.json
description: The state layer of the three-file contract. Cached Figma knowledge — component IDs, variable collections, deprecation maps, audit triage rules. Append-only; only delete entries when the underlying Figma node is confirmed removed.

scanDate.description: ISO date of last full registry regeneration.

page.description: Page the registry was scanned from (usually the components page).

sections.description: Named layout sections on the components page.

components.description: All components and component sets discovered on the components page. Accepts either a flat array of entries (mye-ui shape) or a name-keyed object (legacy shape).

key.description: Published component key. Stable across sessions; use for importComponentByKeyAsync.

section.description: Name of the layout section this component belongs to.

variables.description: Cached variable lookups keyed by collection. Avoid calling get_variable_defs on the whole file; populate this on first access and reuse.

color.description: Map of variable name (e.g. Color/Text/Text-Default) → resolved hex value.

spacing.description: Map of variable name → resolved numeric value (px).

corners.description: Map of variable name → resolved numeric value (px).

versionMap.description: Component deprecation history. Used by figma-swap-library-to-local to resolve non-obvious name mappings.

bindIgnoreRules.description: Persistent audit triage: values that have been reviewed and intentionally left unbound. Consumed by audit skills to avoid re-flagging.
